title: Explosive Block [Cracker's Wither Storm Mod]
description: Add Explosive Block, Weapon, Items, Recipe, New Trap for Cracker's Wither Storm Mod
body:
This mod is add for Cracker's Wither Storm Mod

This is my 5th project

I have a discord account

Join discord [Here](https://discord.gg/5BWTwGf8Rt)

I'm not copy the mod "Cracker's Wither Storm Mod"

Add Explosive Block, Weapon, New Items, Recipe, New Trap

I work alone but I don't work with "nonamecrackers2"

Recipe tutorial in images: Sorry, I can't upload picture

Recipe tutorial download: in "Additional Files", trailer video and Just Enough Items



Instructions on how to make my mod work:
